nasb.text: “In the days of Shamgar the son of Anath, In the days of Jael, the highways were deserted, And travelers went by roundabout ways.

esv.text: “In the days of Shamgar, son of Anath, in the days of Jael, the highways were abandoned, and travelers kept to the byways.

cnv.text: 在亞拿的兒子珊迦的時候， 在雅億的日子，大道無人行走， 行路的人繞道而行。

ccb.text: 在亚拿的儿子珊迦与雅亿的时代， 大路行人绝迹， 旅客绕道而行。
